heading: Customize the Score
body:
MongoDB Search assigns a score to every document in the result set based on
relevance and returns the results in order from highest to the
lowest score. To learn more, see [relevance scoring](scoring-ref).

When you run your MongoDB Search query, you can tune the relevance of the
documents in the results to ensure that the most pertinent documents are
ranked and returned higher in the results.

To learn more, see [How to Customize the Score of the Documents in the Results](fts-customize-score).
